ageRating.note: Users create local recordings, but the apps do not host, publish, browse, moderate, or share UGC through a developer service.

exportCompliance.networking: Apple system networking and HTTPS for fixed BlitzRecorder URLs; local network transport for companion pairing, preview, controls, and transfer.

kidsCategory.rationale: Creator/productivity recording tool with no subscription purchase flow.

paidContentAndSubscriptions.paidBehavior: direct-download Early Lifetime License unlocks iPhone camera, 4K export, and 60 fps export

reviewTriggers: Analytics, crash reporting, ads, attribution, or tracking SDKs are added.
Cloud upload, sharing, hosting, collaboration, comments, public profiles, or publishing are added.
End-user templates, music, stock footage, or other bundled third-party media are added.
Custom encryption, encrypted messaging, VPN/security, DRM, crypto wallet, or password-management functionality is added.
Account, purchase, entitlement, analytics, or cloud upload flows are added.
